    "Content is relevant to organizing days and free time."

  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; High)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Medium)",
    "is the tips -> are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "time to TV -> time on TV (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "leave from -> leave (Lexis; B1; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "I hope, -> I hope (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "at personal messages -> in personal messages (Grammar; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {
        "excerpt": "simular",
        "correction": "similar",

        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "leave from",
        "correction": "leave",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition with verb 'leave' in this context.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "enought",
        "correction": "enough",
        "comment": "Spelling error of quantifier.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      }
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {
        "excerpt": "is the tips",
        "correction": "are the tips",
        "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error (plural subject).",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "this apps",
        "correction": "these apps",
        "comment": "Demonstrative pronoun agreement with plural noun.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "time to TV",
        "correction": "time on TV",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition collocation with 'spend time'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "at personal messages",
        "correction": "in personal messages",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition for communication channels.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {
        "excerpt": "I hope,",
        "correction": "I hope",
        "comment": "Unnecessary comma after introductory clause.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],

        "comment": "Lowercase 'i' is incorrect in standard English.",
        "impact": "High",
        "cefr_threshold": "A1"
      }
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {
      "item": "Numbered list structure",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Text organization",
      "note": "Clear logical organization aids coherence, exceeding basic B1 expectations."
    },
    {
      "item": "Context-specific vocabulary (VK, Play Market)",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Appropriate use of platform-specific terms shows awareness of context."
    }
  ],
  "feedback": "Level B1. You successfully addressed the task with relevant tips and met the sentence count. Your text is clear and organized. However, there are frequent errors in subject-verb agreement ('is the tips'), prepositions ('time to TV', 'at personal messages'), and capitalization ('i'). Focus on these grammar patterns to reach B2.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice subject-verb agreement with plural nouns.",
    "Review common preposition collocations (spend time on, message in).",
    "Ensure consistent capitalization of 'I' and sentence starters."
  ]
}

    "Practice using prepositions with educational contexts (at university vs in the university)."
  ]
}
